briefdescription.para: Write a value to a UartLite register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the UartLite device.
is the register offset from the base to write to.
is the data written to the register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XUartLite_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)

briefdescription.para: Read a value from a UartLite register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the UartLite device.
is the register offset from the base to read from.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u32 XUartLite_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset)

briefdescription.para: Set the contents of the control register.

detaileddescription.para: Use the XUL_CR_* constants defined above to create the bit-mask to be written to the register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device
is the 32-bit value to write to the control register

simplesect.para: C-style Signature: void XUartLite_SetControlReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 Mask);

briefdescription.para: Get the contents of the status register.

detaileddescription.para: Use the XUL_SR_* constants defined above to interpret the bit-mask returned.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device

simplesect.para: A 32-bit value representing the contents of the status register.

briefdescription.para: Check to see if the receiver has data.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device

simplesect.para: TRUE if the receiver is empty, FALSE if there is data present.

briefdescription.para: Check to see if the transmitter is full.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device

simplesect.para: TRUE if the transmitter is full, FALSE otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Check to see if the interrupt is enabled.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device

simplesect.para: TRUE if the interrupt is enabled, FALSE otherwise.

detaileddescription.para: We cannot read the control register, so we just write the enable interrupt bit and clear all others. Since the only other ones are the FIFO reset bits, this works without side effects.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device

detaileddescription.para: We cannot read the control register, so we just clear all bits. Since the only other ones are the FIFO reset bits, this works without side effects.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device

briefdescription.para: This functions sends a single byte using the UART.

detaileddescription.para: It is blocking in that it waits for the transmitter to become non-full before it writes the byte to the transmit register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device
is the byte of data to send

briefdescription.para: This functions receives a single byte using the UART.

detaileddescription.para: It is blocking in that it waits for the receiver to become non-empty before it reads from the receive register.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device
